query: SELECT u.id as user_id, u.name, u.role, u.roles, u.isActive as user_active, s.id as salesperson_id, s.userId, s.isActive as salesperson_active, s.updatedAt as salesperson_updated FROM users u LEFT JOIN salespersons s ON u.id = s.userId WHERE u.id = 15362125;
